creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Mateusz.

Could you please update your Bugzilla email address to match your port MAINTAINER lines (or vice versa) This is so that we can set maintainer-feedback/approval requests appropriately (an account in the system with the maintainers email address is necessary), and to avoid ambiguity/incorrect approvals

Please also set maintainer-approval to + (on attachments)  for patches of ports you maintain. Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+].
